hooks.command: FP=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FP" in *.env|*.env.*|*/certificates/*|*.pem|*.key|*/localhost+*.pem|*/localhost+*-key.pem) printf 'Blocked: %s is a secret/credential path. Edit it manually outside Claude.\n' "$FP" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf %s "$CMD" | grep -qE 'drizzle-kit[[:space:]]+push|(npm|pnpm|yarn)[[:space:]]+run[[:space:]]+db:push'; then printf 'Blocked: %s
Use /db-migrate (db:migrate:dry -> confirm -> db:migrate) instead. db:push bypasses migration files.
' "$CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi; if printf %s "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+push([[:space:]]|$).*--force([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf 'Blocked: %s
Force-push requires manual action. Run it yourself, or use --force-with-lease.
' "$CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi; if printf %s "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+push([[:space:]]|$).*[[:space:]]-f([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf 'Blocked: %s
Force-push requires manual action. Run it yourself, or use --force-with-lease.
' "$CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi

FP=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FP" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && REL=${FP#"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/} && npx --no-install next lint --file "$REL" 2>&1 | tail -60 ;; esac
